commands.review_summary:
The PR adds a nullable `--inherit-from-before` flag to `gog sheets insert`, uses it to override `InsertDimensionRequest.InheritFromBefore`, adds two httptest cases, and edits the changelog.

Reproducibility: yes. Current main derives `inheritFromBefore` solely from `--after`, so source inspection shows there is no way for `--after` to send `false`; I did not run a live Google Sheets reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human/contributor follow-up is needed because the external PR lacks real behavior proof and is currently dirty; repair automation should wait until those merge-gate issues are addressed.

target.title: feat(sheets): add --inherit-from-before to sheets insert
target.body:
Fixes #655.

## Problem
`gog sheets insert` always derived `InsertDimensionRequest.inheritFromBefore` from `--after`:

```go
inheritFromBefore := c.After
```

So there was no way to insert rows/columns with **plain** formatting next to a formatted neighbour. The reported case: inserting plain 0–100 score columns immediately after a currency-formatted column made the new columns render as currency until the format was manually cleared.

## Change
Add a tri-state `--inherit-from-before` flag (`*bool`):

- **omitted** — unchanged behaviour: inherit only when `--after` is set;
- `--inherit-from-before=false` — force plain formatting (the reported need);
- `--inherit-from-before` — force inheritance even on a before-insert.

It maps straight through to `InsertDimensionRequest.inheritFromBefore` and is reflected in the dry-run plan and JSON output (both already surfaced `inheritFromBefore`).

## Testing
`go test ./internal/cmd/ -run TestSheetsInsertCmd` — added two subtests over the existing `httptest` Sheets stub asserting the wire-level `InheritFromBefore`: `--after --inherit-from-before=false` → `false` (override), and a before-insert `--inherit-from-before` → `true` (override). Existing default-behaviour subtests unchanged. `make fmt` + `make lint` (0 issues) + full `internal/cmd` suite green. CHANGELOG updated.
target.author: chrischall
